name: SPS COMMERCE INC
business: SPS Commerce is a global supply chain network that connects retailers, brands, distributors, manufacturers, and logistics providers through shared infrastructure. The company provides cloud-based supply chain management products including Fulfillment, Analytics, Assortment, and Relationship Management. In 2025, recurring revenues accounted for 96% of total revenues.

exposures.sentence: SPS Commerce is a global supply chain network that connects retailers, brands, distributors, manufacturers, and logistics providers through shared infrastructure built to handle the complexity of modern commerce operations.

To navigate disruptions and meet growing demands, companies across the commerce ecosystem must orchestrate operations across wholesale, eCommerce, marketplace, and direct-to-consumer channels simultaneously.
Adopting and utilizing AI and Machine Learning ("ML")-enabled products or services has become increasingly important within our competitive landscape.

A failure to protect the confidentiality and integrity of our customers information and prevent cyber-attacks could materially damage our reputation, expose us to claims and litigation, and lead to service disruptions and harm our business.
